---
title: "Overview"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
description: >
  Start here if this is your first time using mStats. You'll learn the basic   
  concept, the most common data manipulation functions, and facilitating the 
  data analysis workflow with tidyverse package and the pipe, `%>%`.
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Overview}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  \usepackage[utf8]
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# mStats <a href='https://github.com/myominnoo/mStats'><img src='../man/figures/logo.png' align="right" height="120" /></a>
***
